title: Gong Call
description: Represents a call record in the Gong platform, including metadata, participants, timing, and media information.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the call (up to 20 digits).

title.description: The title or subject of the call.

url.description: URL to the call in the Gong web application.

scheduled.description: Scheduled start time of the call in ISO-8601 format.

started.description: Actual start time of the call in ISO-8601 format.

duration.description: Duration of the call in seconds.

scope.description: Whether the call was internal or external.

language.description: The detected language of the call.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier the call belongs to.

primaryUserId.description: The Gong user ID of the primary user on the call.

CallParty.description: A participant in a Gong call.

userId.description: Gong user ID if the party is a Gong user.

affiliation.description: Whether the party is internal or external.
